feedback: Standard roamng in Sweden with normal billing and average support when I had a query. Everything about the international experience was thoroughly mediocre without any extreme. Connectivity abroad is essential for business travelers and this delivered.

The international roamng experience in Nepal was the worst telecom disaster. Random disconnections exorbitant charges of Rs 1999 that did not match my pack and zero support accessibility from overseas. Bill shock upon return. Predictable roaming charges with no bill shock is what every traveler wants.
roamng average and billing was okay.
Calls back home clear from Nepal.
Standard international and domestic coverage okay.

Roaming in Italy was smooth and affordable. Activated the international pack from the app for Rs 1499 before departure and had connectivity from the moment I landed. Data speeds sufficient for all needs including video calls back home. Predictable roaming charges with no bill shock is what every traveler wants.

Roaming in Qatar was functional but unremarkable. Data connected after some initial delay and call quality was acceptable. The Rs 999 pack covers basic needs without being generous. Standard roaming experience comparable to other operators. The roaming pack pricing is fair for the convenience and coverage provided.

Roaming in Saudi Arabia was excellent and the mobile app made managing my international pack effortless. Both the connectivity abroad and the digital management experience worked seamlessly together. International service quality like this builds confidence for future travel.

International roaming was a complete disaster during my trip to Oman. Despite purchasing the Rs 799 roaming pack before departure my phone could not connect to any network abroad. I was stranded without connectivity for my entire business trip costing me credibility.

I was pleasantly surprised by how well roaming worked in South Korea. Previous operators always gave trouble abroad but this one connected automatically and maintained stable data throughout. The Rs 799 pack covered my entire stay comfortably. Connectivity abroad is essential for business travelers and this delivered.
